app.welcome: Not sure where to go? We're your Compass!.
app.welcome2: Unique experiences, amazing restaurants and charming places
bullets.quality.slogan: We upload the places that we visit only if they get over the quality standards
bullets.objectivity.slogan: Weren't influenced by brands or companies, transparency and objectivity first
bullets.empathy.slogan: We put ourselves in the customer's shoes and seek to make their experience perfect!
quality.standard.slogan: Discover the must-haves that any place must have to appear on Itineramio
footer.slogan: Itineramio is a community of people passionate about discovering the infinity of gastronomic places of essential visit in the city of Alicante
collaborate.slogan: Colaborate with us !. Tell us  ... that special place that you want us to visit!
collaborate.title: Send us your favourite place!
collaborate.why: Why this establisment must appear on itineramio?
collaborate.name: Name
collaborate.recommend: I want to recommend the following establishment to itineramio because ...
hiw.title: Magical Places
hiw.slogan: Depending on where you want to be, itineramio tells you the place
hiw.description1: Our greatest obsession is to make each user find the place they need to visit, reducing search time and margin for error. From an old tavern with star cuisine, to a magical place to have the best coffee as a couple.
hiw.description2: Platform created to promote traditional local gastronomy and the best locations in the city.
hiw.description3: Only the places that generate 100% satisfactory experiences for the end customer are part of our standards.
hiw.description4: We rely on our own opinions visiting the place personally, always thinking about the end customer.
hiw.contact.description: If you think there is a restaurant in Alicante (province) that meets the requirements to be visited by us and also exceed expectations in accordance with our quality standards, please contact us
listing.discover: Discover the best restaurants near you
listing.emblematicdesc: This place is representative of the area
listing.notice: All the locations published in itineramio, has the purpose of achieving the best user experience.
